content.en:
The place where the True Extreme Lord and that Ancient Genius who were also in the Seventh Bone Transformation Realm were studying was located in an area outside the Ancient Demon Sea Territory.

this day.

A Bone Transformation Realm came here to watch the excitement, and Ye Tian also came.

Time passes slowly.

The Lord of the True Extreme appeared, and the primeval-level genius of the Seventh Bone Transformation Realm also appeared.

"Lord of the Dead!"

This is the name of this primeval genius.

The Endless Void is the ring.

Two existences of the Seventh-Time Bone Transformation Realm stood on top of this Void Arena, and none of the nearby realms dared to stand on a Bone Transformation Realm, for fear of being affected and killed.

They all retreated far away, peering out from afar.

And Ye Tian also stood far away and snooped, but he could see it clearly.

"Lord of Silence, you are just an primordial-level genius, do you really want to challenge me, there is a big gap between an ancient-level genius and a genius on the other side, if you are not careful, I will kill you!"

The Lord of the True Extremes said.

"Not necessarily!"

The Lord of Silence is also very confident in his own strength.

"Let's get started!"

The Lord of the True Pole and the Silent One have taken the initiative.

Rumble!!!!

As soon as the Lord of the True Pole made a move, it was the magic of the other side.

"The Destruction of the Other Side!"

A hexagonal crystal appears around the Lord of Silence, trapping the Lord of Silence.

"Lord of Silence, you can admit defeat now, otherwise I won't be able to control my Beyond Realm Annihilation Technique once it is activated. "

The Lord of the True Extremes said.

"Less!"

The Lord of Silence said coldly.

The Lord of the True Extremes no longer hesitated, and directly urged the Extinction Technique of the Other Realm.

Airplanes!!!

All matter within the Realm Annihilation Technique on the other side was annihilated in an instant.

However.

The Lord of Silence did not die, he resisted the Extinction Technique of the Other Shore.

At this time, a golden light appeared all over his body, and although the golden light cracked and his body cracked, it was still healing rapidly.

"The golden body on the other side!"

The Lord of the True Extremes finally knows what the Lord of Silence is.

He actually practiced the golden body on the other side, although it was not the golden body on the other side of the body, but many parts of his body were transformed into the golden body on the other side.

"Hahaha, I have indeed practiced the method of the golden body on the other side, and now one-third of my body has been transformed into a golden body on the other side. Otherwise, I wouldn't dare challenge you!"

The Lord of Silence said.

Thundered!!!!

The two sides fought directly.

In terms of attack power, the Lord of Silence is still inferior to the Lord of the True Extreme.

But.

The Golden Body of the Lord of Silence on the other side is indeed very powerful, and its attack power is also very fierce, combined with the top-notch primeval technique, second only to the attack power of the other side's supernatural technique.

And the body of the Lord of the True Pole does not have the golden body of the other side, if it is the golden body of the other side, then it is the real Lord of Hanging and Silence.

And both of them will also know the art of the other side, fighting each other, and no one can help anyone.

"The other side of the supernatural power - the other side of the dust!"

A ray of light pierced through in an instant.

The Lord of Silence didn't dodge, and was instantly hit by this dust light on the other side.

Suddenly, the part of the body that was transformed by the golden body on the other side was cracked, but it quickly healed.

Time passed slowly, and their battle became more and more intense.

But anyone can see that the Lord of Silence is still weaker, at least the Lord of Silence can't hurt the Lord of the True Extreme, but the Lord of the True Extreme can hurt the Lord of the Silence.

......

"This is the magic of the other side!"

Ye Tian carefully comprehended the magic technique of the other side performed by the Lord of the True Extreme, and gradually immersed himself in it.

He had never seen the magic of the other side before, so he didn't know anything about the magic of the other side, but now that he saw the magic of the other side performed by the Lord of the True Extreme, he gradually had some understanding, at least he knew what the magic of the other side was.

That's progress!

Time passes.

This battle was fought for a long time.

In the end, the golden body of the Lord of Silence on the other side could not be maintained, and his body continued to crack and gradually collapse, and he had no choice but to admit defeat.

"True Lord, I admit defeat!"

After the Lord of Exhaustion admits defeat, the Lord of the True Extremes also stops.

After all, the origin of the Lord of Silence is not ordinary, there is a big force behind it, and he naturally can't kill the Lord of Silence.

"It's really hard for an ancient-level genius to defeat a genius on the other side. I've seen a lot of powerful geniuses on the other side, and many of them will also be transformed into a golden body on the other side, I thought that the Lord of the True Extreme, you don't have a golden body on the other side, I have hope to defeat you, but I didn't expect to think too much!"

The Lord of Silence smiled bitterly.

"If you can transform more than sixty percent of your body into gold on the other side, I'm afraid you won't be an opponent!"

The Lord of the True Extremes said.

"Sixty percent of the other side of the golden body, that's too difficult!"

The Lord of Silence shook his head.

Subsequently.

The Lord of Silence is gone, and the Lord of the True Pole has returned to the Ancient Demon Sea.

......

Guheng Mountain.

Ye Tian also returned, and then announced the retreat.

This time, the battle between the Lord of Silence and the Lord of the True Extremes was a great inspiration to him.

He was full of desire for the magic of the other side, and of course, he also knew more about the power of the golden body on the other side.

"I'm just turning one hand into a golden body on the other side, if I turn one-third of my body parts into a golden body on the other side, and then master a magic technique on the other side, I'm afraid I can easily beat the Lord of the True Extreme within the same level!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However.

His current cultivation is only five Bone Transformation Realm, and there is a big gap between him and the True Extreme Lord of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm, and he doesn't know how many primeval epochs have any hope of catching up with them.

"Let's create a magic technique on the other side first, even if it's a very ordinary magic technique on the other side, that's okay!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, in the following years, he continued to try to study the magic of the other side.

The magic of the other side requires the combination of the golden text on the other side and the black text on the other side.

By observing the Divine Powers of the True Extreme, he saw a special power.

That power should be called the power of the other side's origin!

Under certain special circumstances, the Golden Text on the Other Side and the Haven on the Other Side can evolve the power of the Origin of the Other Shore, and by studying the power of the Origin of the Other Shore, one can create a magic technique of the Other Shore.

And the reason why he failed before was that he didn't have a clue, that is, he couldn't study the power of the other side's origin.

But now, he has a research direction, so he will naturally not be confused.

In the years that followed, his first goal was to master a trace of the power of the other side.

An Archievous Era!

Ten primeval eras!

One Hundred Ancient Eras!

A thousand primeval eras had passed, and after such a long time, Ye Tiancai had finally researched a trace of the power of the other side's origin.

If there was a research direction, he would have given up for such a long time.

Fortunately, he persevered, and successfully researched the first trace of the power of the other side.
